Title: Rainbow Pegasus Unicorn Celestial Graphic T-Shirt
Description:
Capture the magic of the cosmos with this vibrant Pegasus and Unicorn graphic tee. Featuring a whimsical celestial design, this shirt is perfect for unicorn lovers, fantasy enthusiasts, and anyone who appreciates cosmic art.

The striking illustration—a glowing unicorn/pegaus surrounded by cosmic dust and stars—is printed on a high-quality, comfortable fabric. It makes a wonderful piece for:

  • Fantasy Wear: Ideal for themed parties, festivals, or casual outings.
  • Gift Giving: A thoughtful and magical gift for unicorn lovers, mythological fans, or young adult collectors.
  • Daily Comfort: Great for everyday wear due to its soft feel and durable print quality.

Details:

  • Material: Soft, breathable cotton blend (or specified blend).
  • Fit: Unisex design suitable for a wide range of sizes.
  • Care: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle.

Show off your inner magic with this beautiful celestial unicorn design!
